rationale: Renaming the emitted trace field from score to SCORE introduces an incompatible output-schema defect.
raw_result:
The change alters the trace’s public field name from `"score"` to `"SCORE"` while still reading `h["score"]`. This breaks consumers expecting the established `"score"` schema and does not change the underlying computation.

{"verdict":"reject","rationale":"Renaming the emitted trace field from score to SCORE introduces an incompatible output-schema defect."}
